item.title: DanDartsDawson: Dan Dawson @DanDartsDawson · 11min Jesus Christ, I am so bored of sports fans moaning about players showing any kind of
item.description: Dan Dawson @DanDartsDawson · 11min Jesus Christ, I am so bored of sports fans moaning about players showing any kind of emotion. "Celebrating like he's won the world championship" is it? Did you not watch the game? Did you not see the stress that he was under? That's what makes sport good, you clowns. 3 2 21 488

item.title: joshpearson180: Josh @joshpearson180 · 7min En respuesta a @DanDartsDawson Don’t come on Twitter dot com and talk common sense Dan, you
item.description: Josh @joshpearson180 · 7min En respuesta a @DanDartsDawson Don’t come on Twitter dot com and talk common sense Dan, you know that’s forbidden on here 2 117

item.title:

item.description:

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 21min "𝙄 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙝𝙤𝙬 𝙜𝙤𝙤𝙙 𝙝𝙚 𝙞𝙨, 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙄 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙄 𝙝𝙖𝙫𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙨𝙖𝙢𝙚 𝙡𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙡 𝙖𝙨 𝙩𝙤𝙙𝙖𝙮."
Recap & react
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 21min "𝙄 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙝𝙤𝙬 𝙜𝙤𝙤𝙙 𝙝𝙚 𝙞𝙨, 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙄 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙄 𝙝𝙖𝙫𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙨𝙖𝙢𝙚 𝙡𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙡 𝙖𝙨 𝙩𝙤𝙙𝙖𝙮."
Recap & reaction from Day Two in Sindelfingen De live-darts.com 828

item.title: Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 33min Is there anything this man can’t do?! De Vic Snooker Academy 1 4 523
item.description: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 33min Is there anything this man can’t do?! De Vic Snooker Academy 1 4 523

item.title: joshpars_: Nick Metcalfe reposteó josh @joshpars_ · 44min En respuesta a @Nick_Metcalfe If i turn the TV on and see this im immedi
item.description: Nick Metcalfe reposteó josh @joshpars_ · 44min En respuesta a @Nick_Metcalfe If i turn the TV on and see this im immediately more invested than id normally be… so i don’t get the entertainment argument for a re-rack 1 3 202

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 58min That’s funny, after saying earlier what a decent side United were under Ron in 84-8
item.description: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 58min That’s funny, after saying earlier what a decent side United were under Ron in 84-85. Cita Sam Carney @samcarney_ · 2h First time #MUFC have won away at Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool in the same league season since 1984/85. 2 374
